User.title: User
User.description: User account containing their profile and custom Gemini API key for billing insulation.

geminiApiKey.description: Optional custom Gemini API key provided by the user

customSystemPrompt.description: Optional customized prompt for multimodal image analysis descriptions

selectedStyleIds.description: Array of applied preset style IDs or custom style IDs

Photo.title: Photo
Photo.description: A capture and its AI description and developed target photo.

photoId.description: Unique identifier of the photo record

originalPhotoUrl.description: The base64 or Google Drive web URL of the original captured photo

originalDriveId.description: Optional Google Drive file ID of the original photo

developedPhotoUrl.description: The developed AI photo URL (base64 or Google Drive view URL)

developedDriveId.description: Optional Google Drive file ID of the developed photo

description.description: Rigorous, detailed textural translation compiled by multimodal Gemini

styleName.description: Name of the applied photographer style or custom style

stylePrompt.description: The styling prompt inject to render the developed picture

createdAt.description: Timestamp when original photo was taken

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when status or description changed

Style.title: Style
Style.description: A custom prompt styling defined by the user to shape the developed image.

styleId.description: Unique ID of the custom style option

Presence.title: Presence
Presence.description: A heartbeat presence record to track active online users.
